build_attempts.root_cause: Render dashboard build command used 'npm install' (not npm scripts PATH), tsx not in PATH
Fix was pushed to wrong path (Desktop/EOMail/EOMail-main/package.json instead of root package.json)

build_attempts.build_command: npm ci && npm run build && npm run db:push
build_attempts.root_cause: npx tsx ran from global cache (/opt/render/.cache/_npx/), isolated from project node_modules where esbuild lives as devDependency

build_attempts.build_command: npm ci && npm run build && npm run db:push
build_attempts.fix_applied: Moved tsx and esbuild from devDependencies to dependencies. Reverted scripts back to 'tsx' (without npx) since npm run adds node_modules/.bin to PATH

issues_found.title: tsx not found during Render build
issues_found.description: tsx binary not available in Render build environment PATH
issues_found.fix: Moved tsx from devDependencies to dependencies so it is always installed and available via node_modules/.bin

issues_found.title: esbuild not found when using npx tsx
issues_found.description: npx tsx runs from global npx cache, cannot resolve project-local devDependencies like esbuild
issues_found.fix: Moved esbuild to dependencies and reverted to plain 'tsx' command (npm scripts add node_modules/.bin to PATH automatically)

issues_found.title: Git repo root at home directory causing path confusion
issues_found.description: Local git repo root is at /Users/nathaniel/ but GitHub has files at repo root. Local edits to EOMail-main/ subdirectory were pushed to Desktop/EOMail/EOMail-main/ on GitHub instead of the root-level files
issues_found.fix: Used GitHub API to directly edit the correct root-level files

issues_found.title: A records pointed to GoDaddy parking IPs
issues_found.description: A records for eomail.co pointed to 74.220.48.0 and 74.220.56.0 (GoDaddy parking), not Render
issues_found.fix: User deleted parking A records and added A record pointing to Render IP 216.24.57.1

issues_found.title: Stale Replit TXT verification record
issues_found.description: TXT record replit-verify=e4ffc278... no longer needed
issues_found.fix: User removed the record from GoDaddy

issues_found.title: Domain mismatch in render.yaml
issues_found.description: render.yaml had DOMAIN=eomail.email.co instead of eomail.co
issues_found.fix: Updated to DOMAIN=eomail.co and added NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL=https://eomail.co

issues_found.title: Render dashboard Root Directory set incorrectly
issues_found.description: Root Directory was 'EOMail-main' but GitHub repo has files at root level
issues_found.fix: User cleared Root Directory in Render dashboard

render_config.build_command: npm ci && npm run build && npm run db:push

steps.action: Move tsx from devDependencies to dependencies
steps.reason: Ensures tsx is always installed regardless of NODE_ENV setting

steps.action: Move esbuild from devDependencies to dependencies
steps.reason: Build script imports esbuild directly — must be available at build time

steps.action: Revert scripts to use 'tsx' without 'npx' prefix
steps.reason: npm run automatically adds node_modules/.bin to PATH. npx creates isolated cache that can't find sibling packages

steps.action: Clear Root Directory in Render dashboard
steps.reason: GitHub repo has package.json at root level, not in EOMail-main/

steps.action: Set build command to 'npm ci && npm run build && npm run db:push'
steps.reason: npm ci is deterministic; && ensures build stops on failure; db:push initializes schema

steps.action: Verify all env vars are set in Render dashboard
Delete GoDaddy parking A records (74.220.48.0, 74.220.56.0)
Add A record @ -> 216.24.57.1 (Render IP)
Verify CNAME www -> eomail.onrender.com
Verify SSL certificate issued for eomail.co and www.eomail.co
Remove stale replit-verify TXT record
Trigger manual deploy on Render with latest commit 6688cbb78
Monitor build logs for successful completion
steps.expected_flow: npm ci -> tsx script/build.ts (Vite client build + esbuild server bundle) -> drizzle-kit push (DB schema)

steps.action: Verify app loads at https://eomail.co
Test user registration and login
Test email send/receive
Test AI features (summary, draft reply, chat)
Go to resend.com/webhooks
Create webhook: URL = https://eomail.co/api/email/inbound
Set webhook secret to match RESEND_WEBHOOK_SECRET env var
Select 'email.received' event
Test by sending email to test@eomail.co and verifying it appears in inbox
Remove 'npm run db:push' from build command after initial deploy
steps.reason: Run schema migrations manually to avoid slowing every deploy

steps.action: Fix hardcoded domain references in source code
Add health check endpoint for Render auto-restart
Clean up repo structure - remove Desktop/EOMail/EOMail-main/ duplicate from GitHub
steps.reason: Duplicate files cause confusion between local and GitHub

steps.action: Plan for PostgreSQL free tier expiration (90 days)
npm audit fix to resolve 3 vulnerabilities (1 low, 1 moderate, 1 high)
